title: The most insightful stories about Artificial Intelligence - Medium
content:
Artificial Intelligence
Recommended stories
Stephanie Kirmer
The New Experience of Coding with AI
The seduction of AI code assistants
Enrique Dans
Enrique Dans
AI won’t replace strategy: it will expose it
Artificial intelligence is not a strategy. It is the fastest, most unforgiving way to discover whether you actually have one.
AI Advances
Krzysztof K. Zdeb
Beyond Vibe Coding: The Artifacts Layer
Specs, plans, guidance, agent skills, and verification gates: the durable intent layer that separates responsible delegation from guessing.
Jason Cowsill
Little Boxes Made of Ticky-Tacky
In 1947, a builder named William Levitt bought 4,000 acres of potato farmland on Long Island and started constructing houses. One house…

How to Grow a Set (of Responsible AI Principles)
Now, this is what I call principled.

Now, this is what I call principled.
Marco van Hurne
The real story behind enterprise scale process agentification
A Big Tech founder materializes on a stage. Sometimes an actual stage with lights and a branded backdrop, sometimes just a podcast…
Data Science Collective
Zenefa Rahaman, PhD
Your AI Agent Is Already a Distributed System — You Just Didn’t Design It That Way
The reliability failures showing up in production agent systems aren’t model problems. They’re architecture problems — and we already know…
Enrique Dans
Enrique Dans
You thought you were anonymous: that’s a puzzle AI can now solve in seconds
It turns out that for years we’ve been living in a fool’s paradise: using a pseudonym was more or less equivalent to being safe. Not…
